data.title: Clean Energy Stocks Face Policy Risks, But JP Morgan Sees Long-Term Upside In These Names
data.description: JP Morgan analyst Mark Strouse shares insights on clean energy sector, with strong power demand, weak residential solar sector, and potential policy changes as key catalysts. Favors companies with US manufacturing, diversified markets, and long-term cash flow visibility.
